title: Convert decimals to percents
description: Practice expressing a decimal like 0.546 as a percent.

hints:
Rewrite the decimal as a fraction with a denominator of 100.

 $0.02 = \dfrac{2}{100}$

$\hphantom{0.02} = 2\%$

 $2$ per hundred = $2$ per cent = $2$ percent

Another way to convert a decimal to a percent is to multiply by $100$ (or move the decimal two places to the right) and add a percent sign.

 $0.02 \times 100= {2}\%$

Rewrite the decimal as a fraction with a denominator of 100.
